name: meindeutsch
description: MeinDeutsch monorepo root — runs backend + frontend together.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta -k "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.check: npm --prefix backend run check && npm --prefix frontend run check
